analysis.reasoning: The tweet announces a Russian-hosted cultural/history event (an exhibition on anti-Nazi resistance and a memory-focused online conference), emphasizing heritage and historical memory. This aligns with RU6 (Russia as a country with culture, nature, and heritage). There is no explicit framing of the West as immoral, nor promotion of a non-Western multilateral system or Russia as a benevolent partner in the tweet, so RU6 is the applicable narrative.
